name: ultimate-frontend-design
description: Complete frontend design plugin for Claude Code. Ships TWO skills: (1) ultimate-frontend-design, 20 core sections + 15 reference files covering visual hierarchy, typography, color, motion, accessibility, mobile patterns, 3D & immersive web, modern CSS 2024-2026, performance, and design psychology, scored 0-10 with a weighted rubric. (2) claude-design-systems, DESIGN.md contract pattern, Jens Heitmann three systems, Nano Banana 2 visual workflow, and premium build playbooks for using Claude Code itself as a project-wide design system.
author: ahmadmosama
